about.label: About Me
about.title: The person behind the pixels
about.quote: I quit the 9-to-5 at 19 to build the web.
about.description: I'm Ethan, 19, based in Gibraltar. I quit the 9-to-5 to build websites, automate workflows, and grow businesses through SEO. Currently managing 16+ sites across real estate, tourism, and local services.

ctaSection.title: Let's build something.
ctaSection.description: Got a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Whether it's a new website, an automation workflow, or an SEO strategy, let's make it happen.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your project. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

form.name: Your Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, your goals, and what you're looking for...

aside.bookCallDescription: Book a free 15-minute discovery call. No pressure, just a chat about your project.

about.label: About Me
about.title: The full story.
about.intro1: I'm Ethan, 19, based in Gibraltar. I quit my 9-to-5 to go all-in on building websites, automating workflows, and growing businesses through SEO.
about.intro2: I believe the best way to learn is by doing. So I built 16+ sites across real estate, tourism, and local services to prove I could do it for real.
about.quote: "I quit the 9-to-5 at 19 to build the web."
about.story: Most people my age are in university or climbing the corporate ladder. I chose a different path. I taught myself web design, SEO, and AI automation by building real projects for real niches. No courses, no bootcamps. Just shipping work and learning from every mistake.
about.stats: 16+ sites built · Bilingual (EN/ES) · Gibraltar & La Linea

started.title: Started learning web development
started.description: Picked up HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Built my first sites. Got hooked on the idea of making things for the internet.

portfolio.title: Built the SEO portfolio
portfolio.description: Started buying domains and building content sites targeting Gibraltar and La Linea. Real estate, tourism, relocation, fitness.

quit.title: Quit the 9-to-5
quit.description: Left my job to go full-time on freelancing. Scary? Yes. Worth it? Absolutely. Time is the most valuable thing I have.

freelance.title: Launched freelance services
freelance.description: Started offering web design, AI automation, and SEO to businesses in Gibraltar and La Linea. Built this site to prove what I can do.

craft.title: Quality over speed
craft.description: I'd rather take an extra day and deliver something great than rush out something mediocre. Every project gets my full attention.

honesty.title: Straight talk
honesty.description: No jargon, no bullshit. I'll tell you what I think, what I can do, and what's realistic. You'll always know where things stand.

speed.title: Ship fast, iterate
speed.description: Perfect is the enemy of done. I ship, get feedback, and improve. Your site goes live fast and gets better from there.

services.label: Services
services.title: What I build.
services.subtitle: Web design, AI automation, and SEO for businesses in Gibraltar and La Linea. Everything you need to look great online and get found.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Custom websites built from scratch. Not templates, not page builders. Real code, real design, built to convert.
webDesign.point2: Fast loading speeds (optimised for Core Web Vitals)
webDesign.point4: Content management so you can update it yourself

aiAutomation.title: AI Automation
aiAutomation.description: Smart workflows that handle the repetitive stuff so you can focus on what matters. Save hours every week.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Get found on Google. Multilingual content, technical SEO, and keyword targeting built for the Gibraltar market.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small local businesses that need a professional online presence.

business.name: Business
business.description: For growing businesses that need more features and flexibility.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Full-service package for businesses that want everything done right.

services.pricingNote: All prices are one-time. Monthly management plans available from £60/month.
